name: Large Round Braided Seagrass Basket - Brightroom™: Handwoven Khaki Wicker for Blanket Storage, Nest Certified
description:
Bring extra storage to any space with this Large Round Braided Seagrass Basket from Brightroom™. This large-size round basket can be used for storage or as a decorative accent. Designed with integrated circular handles for easy portability, it features a handwoven seagrass construction in a lacquered finish for a natural textured look that's easy to pair with other decor. Great for holding household items like pillows and throw blankets, it can be spot cleaned when required.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.

SIZE: 16"H X 18" DIA
INTERIOR DIMENSIONS : 16.75" DIA X 12.5"H X 15.5"TH
